column8: Ravi Shankar was born in 1920 and lived until 2010. He was famous_____________from India. (MUSIC)

column10: Shanker played_____________Indian songs that dated back centuries but were mostly unknown outside his own country. (CLASSIC)
column11: In the 1950s, Shankar began touring the USA, playing Indian music around the country. He soon became popular with American music_________ . (LOVE)

column13: Shankar won many awards in his______________career. He won Grammy awards and recieved the highest civilian honours in India and France. (CREDIBLE)
column14: I went shopping yesterday. When I went into my local bookshop, I saw something__________ . (AMAZE)
